blockingIssues.description: extractBaseRole() in discovery-memory-store.ts:2513 calls normalizePhrase() which is not imported or defined in that file — it only exists as a local function in company-planner.ts. This causes a ReferenceError crash when learnRoleFamilyFromLead() is called with any non-empty title. All existing tests pass because they mock learnRoleFamilyFromLead, masking the bug. Fix: either import normalizePhrase from company-planner.ts, or extract it to a shared utility module.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that loop-memory-worker may modify company-planner.ts for memory-readback wiring (planner targeting, role-family candidate injection). The current write-scope partition lists company-planner.ts under loop-scoring-worker exclusively, but the loop-memory-worker skill explicitly includes 'wire memory readback into future seeding/ranking/cooldown behavior' which implies planner modifications.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave4-role-family-learning-deterministic created role-family candidate injection in company-planner.ts (lines 331-380) while assigned to loop-memory-worker. AGENTS.md lists company-planner.ts under loop-scoring-worker scope only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the scope overlap for grounded-search.ts between loop-relevance-worker and loop-browser-worker. The loop-relevance-worker skill includes 'relevance gating paths in grounded-search.ts' but AGENTS.md assigns grounded-search.ts to loop-browser-worker exclusively.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave4-relevance-routing-hardening modified grounded-search.ts (informational page veto). AGENTS.md write-scope partition lists grounded-search.ts under loop-browser-worker. The skill says it's in scope for relevance gating.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce the convention 'Stage only mission-relevant files in commits.' Multiple wave-4 commits bundle large amounts of unrelated infrastructure scaffolding (e.g., wave4-role-family-learning-deterministic bundles 2,833 lines of career-surface-resolver.ts + listing-fingerprint.ts; wave4-relevance-routing-hardening has 58 files / 9,214 insertions including 17 new ATS provider files). While not functionally harmful, this makes git history harder to audit and blurs feature boundaries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Commit 8a35aae includes career-surface-resolver.ts (970 lines) and listing-fingerprint.ts (862 lines) with no dependency on role-family learning. Commit a4f75b4 includes 58 files spanning loop-ats-worker, loop-core-worker, and loop-browser-worker scopes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement that new persistence methods (writeExploitOutcome, listExploitOutcomes, upsertRoleFamily, listRoleFamilies, learnRoleFamilyFromLead) must have dedicated round-trip tests against the real store, not just mock stubs. The wave4-memory-outcomes-yield-cooldown feature claimed VAL-LOOP-MEM-002/003/005 but has zero dedicated test coverage for these methods — tests only mock them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: discovery-memory-store.test.ts only adds count assertions (exploitOutcomes: 0, roleFamilies: 0). run-discovery.test.ts mocks all new methods. No test names reference VAL-LOOP-MEM-002, VAL-LOOP-MEM-003, or VAL-LOOP-MEM-005.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider extracting shared utility functions (escapeRegExp, keyword/phrase matching) used by both lead-normalizer.ts and job-matcher.ts into a shared module to prevent future drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lead-normalizer.ts:keywordMatchesHaystack (line 400) and job-matcher.ts:phraseMatchesHaystack (line 661) are near-identical. Both use the same regex boundary pattern and escapeRegExp helper.

rejectedObservations.observation: AI matcher budget constants (4, 12, 0.72) lack documented rationale.
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking code quality suggestion; too specific for AGENTS.md guidance. Better addressed as a code comment in the implementation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Roman numerals in seniorityPrefixes array could incorrectly strip valid title prefixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking code-level bug; not a systemic or cross-feature concern. Should be addressed in a fix feature if needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill test command discrepancy between SKILL.md and features.json verification steps.
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor and ambiguous — the features.json verification steps are more comprehensive than the skill's, which is acceptable. Not actionable as guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: career-surface-resolver.ts was created by loop-memory-worker but AGENTS.md assigns it to loop-browser-worker.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already covered by the broader commit-scope convention suggestion above. Deduplicating.
